title: Python
description: Executes Python code in a restricted in-process sandbox via exec().
Only whitelisted modules can be imported. Dangerous builtins are removed.

tool_python.timeout.title: Execution Timeout (seconds)
tool_python.timeout.description: Maximum time in seconds a script is allowed to run before being killed. Default is 20s. Increase for long-running operations like network scans.

tool_python.allowedModules.title: Additional Allowed Modules
tool_python.allowedModules.description: Modules the agent is allowed to import, in addition to the built-in defaults (math, json, re, collections, datetime, etc.).
